mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM student
stu_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student(stu_no, stu_name, gender, age, major) VALUES (#{stuNo}, #{stuName}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{major})
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET stu_no=#{stuNo}, stu_name=#{stuName}, gender=#{gender}, age=#{age}, major=#{major} WHERE id=#{id}
